Namkeen · Est. 1951

Pudina Sev

પુદિના સેવ

"Cool mint, crispy sev — a one-of-a-kind bite."

Pudina Sev is our most unique variety — thin besan sev made with fresh mint (pudina) puree kneaded into the dough, giving it a striking green colour and a refreshing, cooling flavour. A must-try for anyone who loves something different.

Spice Level

🔴⚪⚪⚪ Very Mild

Shelf Life

12–15 days

Available In

200g · 500g

Best With

As a standalone snack

Order on WhatsApp ← Full Menu

How It's Made

કેવી રીતે બને છે

Every batch at SSKFG is made by hand, the same way it has been since 1951. No shortcuts. No machines doing what hands can do better.

1

Fresh pudina (mint) leaves are blanched and pureed into a smooth paste.

2

This paste is kneaded into gram flour with salt and mild spices to form a vibrant green dough.

3

The dough is pressed through a fine sev plate and fried quickly in hot oil to preserve the green colour and fresh minty flavour.

Ingredients

સામગ્રી

Gram Flour (Besan)Fresh Mint (Pudina)Vegetable OilSaltGreen ChilliGingerAsafoetida

Contains Allergens

⚠ Gluten (Besan)
